lines.speaker: Wizard Sinina
lines.text: Welcome to the Magic Guild Store. Would you like to buy some magic supplies?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about your cape?

lines.speaker: Wizard Sinina
lines.text: Certainly! Skillcapes are a symbol of achievement. Only people who have mastered a skill and reached level 99 can get their hands on them and gain the benefits they carry.

lines.speaker: Wizard Sinina
lines.text: The Cape of Magic allows you to switch spellbooks five times per day. Now, would you like to buy some magic supplies?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have another hood for my cape, please?

lines.speaker: Wizard Sinina
lines.text: Most certainly, and free of charge!
